_comment: AI draft — Receive batch. Same theme as Sale: unify VOID to Tirtir (was 'ka noqo'/'joojin' + camelCase bug 'KaNoqo'). Plus search-hint consistency with Sale. NOTE: kept existing 'dajin' spelling here — see the separate dajin->dejin question. ⚠ = confirm.
receiveVoidConfirmTitle: was 'Ka noqo alaab dajintan?'; question kept
receiveVoidFailedMessage: Alaab dajinta lama tirtiri karin. Hubi internetka oo isku day mar kale.
receiveVoidConfirmBody: Tan u isticmaal kaliya marka aad qaladka u dhigtay alaab dajinta. Alaab dajinta waa la tirtiri doonaa, alaabta bakhaarka waa laga dhimi doonaa, oo lacagta aad alaab keenaha ka qabto waa la tirtiri doonaa.
receiveVoidBlockedStockMessage: Alaabaha alaab dajintan qaarkood mar hore wuu dhaqaaqay. Tirtiridda waa la diiday.
receiveSearchHint: match the Sale search hint you approved
